items.name: Recraft 4.1
items.description: V4.1 image generation with selectable model_type for standard exploration, vector logos/icons, utility product shots/mockups, and utility_vector brand assets

parameters.name: resolution
parameters.description: Output resolution: 1k for everyday work, 2k for larger assets

parameters.name: batch_size
parameters.description: Images per submitted job (1-4)

parameters.name: model_type
parameters.description: Recraft V4.1 variant. standard is expressive and exploratory; vector is for logos, typography, icons, and SVG-like illustration; utility is cleaner, flatter, front-facing, and predictable for product shots and mockups; utility_vector combines utility simplicity with vector output.

parameters.name: colors
parameters.description: Optional color palette, up to 10 colors. Each color must be #RRGGBB: six hex digits with leading # and no alpha channel. Do not use #RGB shorthand, #RRGGBBAA, rgba(), or color names.

parameters.name: background_color
parameters.description: Optional #RRGGBB background color with no alpha channel, or null. Use for controlled flat backgrounds, brand swatches, product mockups, icons, and vector-style work.

parameters.name: resolution
parameters.description: Output resolution

items.name: Marketing Studio Image
items.description: One-click product image ads for social campaigns

parameters.name: resolution
parameters.description: Output resolution

items.name: DTC Ads
items.description: DTC ad image generation with brand-kit-aware prompts, avatars, products, and curated ad formats

parameters.name: style_id
parameters.description: REQUIRED. Marketing Studio image style id. There is no default — calling `generate_image` with `model='ms_image'` without `style_id` returns an error. REQUIRED WORKFLOW: BEFORE calling `generate_image` with `model='ms_image'`, you MUST first call `show_marketing_studio` with `type='image_style'` and let the user pick a style. Style is the dominant creative driver for ms_image output, so silently defaulting would produce a result the user didn't ask for. Only proceed once the user has named a specific style id from the listing.

parameters.name: brand_kit_id
parameters.description: Marketing Studio brand kit id. List/create via `show_marketing_studio` with `type='brand_kit'`. When set, the chosen kit's logo, images, colours, fonts, and tone are folded into the prompt. The kit must be `status: 'completed'`.

parameters.name: resolution
parameters.description: Output resolution.

parameters.name: quality
parameters.description: Output quality. Affects cost.

parameters.name: batch_size
parameters.description: Number of images generated per job (1-20). Cost scales linearly. Distinct from `count`, which controls how many jobs are submitted in parallel.

parameters.name: product_ids
parameters.description: Up to 4 Marketing Studio product ids. List products via `show_marketing_studio` with `type='product'`. Server pre-resolves their media inputs and runs IP check before queueing.

parameters.name: folder_id
parameters.description: Optional folder placement.

items.name: Auto
items.description: Auto-selects the best image model based on prompt intent

items.name: AutoSprite Animation
items.description: Animate a character image into a game-ready sprite sheet PNG with optional atlas and audio metadata

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Animation preset. Use 'custom' with prompt and name for a custom animation.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Custom animation name. Required only when kind is 'custom'.

parameters.name: video_tier
parameters.description: Generation quality/cost tier. 'turbo' is fastest and cheapest; 'max' is highest cost.

parameters.name: frame_count
parameters.description: Number of frames in the sprite sheet.

parameters.name: frame_size
parameters.description: Frame width/height in pixels.

parameters.name: remove_bg
parameters.description: Background removal mode.

parameters.name: with_sound
parameters.description: Generate sound effects when available. Adds cost.

parameters.name: is_humanoid
parameters.description: Whether the source character is humanoid.

medias.name: medias
medias.description: Single character image to animate into a sprite sheet (role: image).

parameters.name: budget
parameters.description: Generation budget (10-500)
